message.content:
@startuml
title orderList表示

actor "配送員" as 配送員

interface Courieridform.jsp as Courieridform.jsp
interface OrderListServlet as OrderListServlet
interface CourierDAO as CourierDAO
interface Courier as Courier
interface Session as Session
interface OrderDAO as OrderDAO
interface Order as Order
interface DetailDAO as DetailDAO
interface Detail as Detail
interface Request as Request
interface orderedlist.jsp as orderedlist.jsp

note right of Courieridform.jsp
  courierID入力
end note

note right of Courieridform.jsp
  リンク
end note

note right of OrderListServlet
  findByCourierid()
end note

note right of CourierDAO
  生成
end note

note right of CourierDAO
  Courier
end note

note right of OrderListServlet
  Courier
end note

note right of Session
  findAll()
end note

note right of OrderDAO
  生成
end note

note right of OrderDAO
  findByOrderId()
end note

note right of DetailDAO
  リスト生成
end note

note right of OrderDAO
  ArrayList<Detail>
end note

note right of OrderDAO
  setDetail (ArrayList<Detail>)
end note

note right of OrderDAO
  ArrayList<Order>
end note

note right of OrderListServlet
  setAttribute(ArrayList<Order>)
end note

note right of OrderListServlet
  フォワード
end note

note right of orderedlist.jsp
  表示
end note

note right of Courieridform.jsp
  表示
end note

 Courieridform.jsp --> OrderListServlet : リンク
 OrderListServlet --> CourierDAO : findByCourierid()
 CourierDAO --> Courier : 生成
 CourierDAO -. Courier : Courier
 OrderListServlet --> Session : Courier
 OrderListServlet --> OrderDAO : findAll()
 OrderDAO --> Order : 生成
 OrderDAO --> DetailDAO : findByOrderId()
 DetailDAO --> Detail : リスト生成
 OrderDAO -. OrderDAO : ArrayList<Detail>
 OrderDAO --> OrderDAO : setDetail (ArrayList<Detail>)
 OrderDAO -. OrderListServlet : ArrayList<Order>
 OrderListServlet --> Request : setAttribute(ArrayList<Order>)
 OrderListServlet --> orderedlist.jsp : フォワード
 orderedlist.jsp --> 配送員 : 表示
 Courieridform.jsp --> 配送員 : 表示

@enduml
